Bash(python3.11 -c "
import screen
img = screen.capture_screen\(\)
b64, sx, sy = screen.image_to_base64\(img\)
h = screen.image_hash\(img\)
print\(f'capture OK: {img.size}'\)
print\(f'encode OK: {len\(b64\)} chars, scale {sx:.2f}x{sy:.2f}'\)
print\(f'hash OK: {h}'\)
print\(f'encode_pil OK: {len\(screen.encode_pil\(img\)\)} chars'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3.11 -c "
import markers, screen
img = screen.capture_screen\(\)
_, sx, sy = screen.image_to_base64\(img\)
elem_map, ok = markers.get_interactive_elements\(sx, sy\)
print\(f'AX available: {ok}'\)
print\(f'Elements found: {len\(elem_map\)}'\)
for mid, e in list\(elem_map.items\(\)\)[:5]:
    print\(f'  #{mid} [{e[\\"role\\"]}] {e[\\"label\\"]!r} center_screen={tuple\(int\(v\) for v in e[\\"center_screen\\"]\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

import ctypes, ctypes.util

cf = ctypes.cdll.LoadLibrary\(ctypes.util.find_library\('CoreFoundation'\)\)

Bash(python3.11 -c "
import markers, ctypes
from AppKit import NSWorkspace

pid = NSWorkspace.sharedWorkspace\(\).frontmostApplication\(\).processIdentifier\(\)
markers._ax_lib.AXUIElementCreateApplication.restype = markers._AXUIElementRef
markers._ax_lib.AXUIElementCreateApplication.argtypes = [markers._pid_t]
app_elem = markers._ax_lib.AXUIElementCreateApplication\(pid\)
print\('app_elem:', app_elem\)

role = markers._ax_get_role\(app_elem\)
print\('role:', role\)
children = markers._ax_get_children\(app_elem\)
print\('children count:', len\(children\)\)
if children:
    child = children[0]
    print\('first child type:', type\(child\), 'val:', child\)
    role2 = markers._ax_get_role\(child\)
    print\('child role:', role2\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3.11 -c "
import markers, ctypes
from AppKit import NSWorkspace
pid = NSWorkspace.sharedWorkspace\(\).frontmostApplication\(\).processIdentifier\(\)
app_elem = markers._ax.AXUIElementCreateApplication\(pid\)
children = markers._ax_get_array_attr\(app_elem, 'AXChildren'\)
child0 = children[0]
key = markers._mk_cfstr\('AXRole'\)
out = markers._VOIDP\(0\)
print\('before AXCopy call'\)
err = markers._ax.AXUIElementCopyAttributeValue\(child0, key, ctypes.byref\(out\)\)
print\('err:', err, 'out:', out.value\)
" 2>&1)
